_publications._publicationTitle: Chemical genetic screens reveal defective lysosomal trafficking as synthetic lethal with NF1 loss.

_contextSnippet: This result suggests that Y102 does not mediate cell death through caspase-3-mediated apoptosis, and was confirmed by western blotting for PARP
details: Successfully detected PARP cleavage by western blotting to confirm lack of caspase-3-mediated apoptosis with Y102 treatment
